info.title: Opengram API
info.description: API for the Opengram messaging platform.

tags.name: Dispatch
tags.description: Agent dispatch batch claiming and lifecycle

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Full-text search across chats and messages

messageId.description: Message ID to attach the media to
Message ID to attach the media to

rawConfig.description: Replace the entire config file (mutually exclusive with other fields)

endpoint.description: Push subscription endpoint URL to remove

schema.description: Optional idempotency key. If provided, duplicate requests with the same key and payload return the cached response instead of creating a new resource.

parameters.description: Optional idempotency key. If provided, duplicate requests with the same key and payload return the cached response instead of creating a new resource.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.summary: Create a request in a chat

schema.description: Optional idempotency key. If provided, duplicate requests with the same key and payload return the cached response instead of creating a new resource.

parameters.description: Optional idempotency key. If provided, duplicate requests with the same key and payload return the cached response instead of creating a new resource.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.summary: Cancel all streaming messages in a chat

post.description: Accepts multipart/form-data (with a `file` field) or application/json (with base64-encoded data). Body is parsed by a custom handler — see MediaUploadMultipart and MediaUploadJson schemas for the expected formats.
Body is optional. If provided, must be JSON with an optional `finalText` field.

schema.description: Include ephemeral events (e.g. typing indicators). Defaults to true if omitted.

parameters.description: Include ephemeral events (e.g. typing indicators). Defaults to true if omitted.
parameters.name: ephemeral

200.description: SSE event stream. Each event is a JSON-encoded EventEnvelope with `id`, `type`, and payload fields.
